name: UserPropertyOperations
description: An object containing user property operations. Each key is an operation type and the value is an object of property names to values.

$set.description: Set the value of a user property. If the property already exists, the value is overwritten.

$setOnce.description: Set the value of a user property only if it has not already been set. Useful for properties like initial_referrer.

$add.description: Increment a numeric user property by the specified value.

$append.description: Append a value or values to a list user property.

$prepend.description: Prepend a value or values to a list user property.

$unset.description: Remove a user property by setting its value to the string $unset.

$remove.description: Remove a value from a list user property.
